ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Final result of the match */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the home team in the league at the time of the match */,
  "tries_home" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored by the home team */,
  "goals_home" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "drops_home" INTEGER /* Number of drop goals scored by the home team */,
  "points_home" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "tries_away" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored by the away team */,
  "goals_away" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "drops_away" INTEGER /* Number of drop goals scored by the away team */,
  "points_away" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's manager */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the team (in millions of pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the manager is associated with */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of managerial experience */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "suspension_status" TEXT /* Current suspension status of the player */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Estimated market value of the player (in thousands of pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic is associated with */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is associated with */,
  "tries" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "drops" INTEGER /* Number of drop goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "meters_gained" INTEGER /* Total meters gained by the player */,
  "linebreaks" INTEGER /* Number of linebreaks made by the player */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the player */,
  "penalties_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points conceded */,
  "try_difference" INTEGER /* Difference in tries scored and conceded */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference in goals scored and conceded */,
  "drop_goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference in drop goals scored and conceded */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated in the league */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position in the league */,
  "league_position" TEXT /* League position (e.g., Champions, Runners-up, Relegated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., try, conversion, penalty) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event (e.g., 10th minute, 45th minute) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the event is associated with */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the event is associated with */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "assist_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted in the event (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season year */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "injury_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the injury (e.g., 2 weeks, 1 month) */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Recovery status (e.g., recovering, recovered) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension was imposed */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension (e.g., foul play, misconduct) */,
  "suspension_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the suspension (e.g., 1 match, 2 weeks) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the suspension (e.g., active, lifted) */,
  "suspension_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee (in thousands of pounds) */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the new contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the new contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the new contract (in thousands of pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., match results, player stats) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue manager */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_venues" (
  "match_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match venue entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_venues_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel broadcasting the match */,
  "broadcast_date" TEXT /* Date of the broadcast */,
  "broadcast_time" TEXT /* Time of the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
